utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan specifies integrated physical and mental health support and a cost (€330/month) — fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. It provides a policy name focused on home with fine art & electronics and a cost (€195/month) — fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. It provides a policy tailored to family/global travel with endorsements and a cost (€205/month) — fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. It provides a concierge service and cost (€50/month) — fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It provides a monthly total (€780/month) but does not include an annual breakdown, so it is not fully specified as per the requirement for monthly/annual. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three named policies/services: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), ParisHome Luxury Coverage with Fine Art & Electronics Protection (property), FamilyGlobal Platinum (travel), and Family Insurance Concierge (service). From the ground-truth ratings, only EliteCare Premium Plan appears, with a rating of 10 under both physical and mental health. The other three items do not exist in the ground-truth list, so only EliteCare Premium Plan can be mapped to a rating.
